scenes.title: Harbor at Golden Hour
scenes.backgroundDescription: A wooden fishing dock at late afternoon, looking out across calm water toward a distant headland. The faint pencil scaffolding shows: wispy clouds in the upper sky; a low headland curve on the left horizon; horizontal ripple lines across the water (denser near the horizon, opening toward the dock); a one-point perspective dock surface with planks converging to a vanishing point on the right; and a heavier line where the dock meets the water.

scenes.title: Morning Windowsill
scenes.backgroundDescription: A sunlit kitchen window with a still-life arrangement on the sill and counter below. The faint pencil scaffolding shows: a double-hung window frame with vertical and horizontal sash bars; an impressionistic garden suggestion outside the glass (a tree silhouette, shrubs, soft clouds); a windowsill shelf below the window; a horizontal counter line; long wavy wood-grain lines on the counter; and a few diagonal morning light rays from the upper-left.

scenes.title: Garden Courtyard
scenes.backgroundDescription: A walled Mediterranean courtyard in late afternoon. The faint pencil scaffolding shows: a single wispy cloud high in the sky; a low stone wall capping the back with brick suggestion marks; climbing vines draping over the wall; a single tree trunk with lower branches on the right side; and a terracotta tile floor in two-point perspective with afternoon shadow streaks across the foreground.

scenes.title: Afternoon at the Park
scenes.backgroundDescription: A sunlit city park viewed from a gentle elevation. Faint pencil scaffolding shows: a clear sky with wispy clouds; a distant tree line along the upper edge; a winding gravel path curving from the lower-left toward the center; a decorative fountain in the middle distance; a wooden park bench along the path; and a grassy foreground with dappled shade patches.

scenes.title: Corner of Main Street
scenes.backgroundDescription: A one-point perspective view of a historic commercial street block at street level. Faint pencil scaffolding shows: a horizon line at eye level with a single vanishing point on the right; a wide sidewalk with perspective joints converging toward the vanishing point; building facades with floor and ceiling lines in perspective; a clear storefront zone at street level with tall openings; and a parked car silhouette near the right edge.
